meta.description: MultiDeck persona registry. Single source of truth for agent callsigns, colors, voices, working directories, and activation metadata.

dispatch.description: Workspace-level ambient coordinator. Cross-project routing, calendar, email, briefings.

architect.description: Project structure, PM, documentation, cross-agent coordination.

engineer.description: Code implementation, testing, debugging, build validation.

reviewer.description: Quality gate. Reviews every completed job, PASS/FLAG, fix loops, escalation.

researcher.description: Investigation, evidence grading, source citation, research.

launcher-engineer.description: MultiDeck launcher UI, dashboard routes, Windows Terminal integration, persona spawning.

voice-technician.description: Kokoro TTS hooks, mutex queue, per-session voice isolation, callsign announcements, custom voice blends.

persona-author.description: Meta persona. Writes new AGENT.md files, maintains personas.json registry, keeps templates in sync.

commercial-producer.description: End-to-end commercial production: script, VO, music bed, scene direction, review gate, final master.
